major: Strict Role-Based Access Control (RBAC) at the component and route level.
Complete Data Abstraction using TanStack React Query for caching, loading states, and mutations.
100% Type Safety ensuring frontend interfaces strictly match backend Mongoose schemas.
Premium Theme Consistency (Light/Dark mode) using the established theme blueprint.
minor: Flawless and responsive UI using Tailwind CSS.
Modularization (Extracting complex UI pieces into smaller, reusable components).
Graceful degradation and error handling (Toasters and inline error messages).
Implementation of skeleton loaders to prevent layout shifts during data fetching.

per_page_implementation_flow.step_1_audit: Review existing page, child components, and API integration.
per_page_implementation_flow.step_2_data_layer: Extract all direct API calls into a dedicated `src/hooks/api/use[Module].ts` file using React Query.
per_page_implementation_flow.step_3_rbac_enforcement: Wrap protected action buttons and sensitive data fields in role-checking logic.
per_page_implementation_flow.step_4_ui_refactor: Apply the Premium Theme Blueprint (Cards, Inputs, Tables, Modals) ensuring dark mode support.
per_page_implementation_flow.step_5_modularity: Break down large page files into smaller, manageable sub-components if necessary.
per_page_implementation_flow.step_6_final_review: Verify responsiveness, loading states (skeletons), and error boundaries.

architectural_rules.state_management: Redux for UI/Auth State ONLY. React Query for Server Data ONLY.
architectural_rules.styling: No hardcoded hex colors. Use Tailwind semantic colors with strict `dark:` modifiers.
architectural_rules.imports: Strict absolute imports (`@/components/...`) over relative paths.
